title: calamintha glabella var. angustifolia
intro: Calamintha glabella var. angustifolia, also known as a type of mountain mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and protect against infections. The health benefits of Calamintha glabella var. angustifolia include its ability to relieve digestive issues, ease respiratory problems, and support immune function, making it a popular remedy for colds, coughs, and other minor ailments. In herbal preparations, Calamintha glabella var. angustifolia can be used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
